info.title: NoteDeck API
info.description: NoteDeck localhost API — Misskey desktop client control interface

200.description: API name, version, auth hint, and the full endpoint list derived from this spec
Registered capabilities with signatures (id, name, label, category, description, params, returns, permissions, requiresConfirmation)

requestBody.description: Capability params (JSON object, omit for parameterless capabilities)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Comma-separated event type prefixes to filter the stream

200.description: Server-sent event stream (`text/event-stream`). Each event carries an `event:` type and a JSON `data:` payload. OpenAPI cannot model a streaming body, so the schema is shown as a string.
Health report: notecli doctor + backendReady + frontendReady + per-account stream states

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of items to return (default 20)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of items to return (default 20)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of reactions to return (default 20)

parameters.name: until_id
parameters.description: Return reactions older than this ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of items to return (default 20)

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Return items newer than this ID

parameters.name: until_id
parameters.description: Return items older than this ID

parameters.name: tl_type
parameters.description: Timeline type: home | local | social | global

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of items to return (default 20)

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Return items newer than this ID

parameters.name: until_id
parameters.description: Return items older than this ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of items to return (default 20)

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Return items newer than this ID

parameters.name: until_id
parameters.description: Return items older than this ID

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: Optional max width for thumbnail generation (e.g. 300)

AccountPublic.description: Token を含まない、フロントエンド向け Account 構造体

scheduled_at.description: Schedule the note for this ISO-8601 timestamp

blurhash.description: blurhash プレースホルダ文字列

width.description: 画像の幅 (px)。フロントの aspect-ratio 予約 (レイアウトシフト防止) 用

hasPendingFollowRequestFromYou.description: 鍵アカウントへフォローリクエスト送信済みで未承認の状態

isLocked.description: 鍵アカウント (フォローに承認が必要) かどうか

memo.description: このユーザーに対する自分用メモ (users/update-memo)

notify.description: フォロー中のみ意味を持つ: 'normal' | 'none' (投稿通知)

pinnedNoteIds.description: users/show 応答に同梱されるピン留めノート ID (notedeck#632)

pinnedNotes.description:
users/show 応答に同梱されるピン留めノート本体。追加の users/show +
notes/show × N を往復せずプロフィールを 1 リクエストで描ける (notedeck#632)

withReplies.description: フォロー中のみ意味を持つ: TL に他者への返信を含めるか
